# Generated by ollama (deepseek-coder_6.7b-instruct)
# Prompt: Write a Docker Compose file for ELK Stack (Elasticsearch, Logstash, Kibana) and APM Server. Configure all services with network settings. Set up communication between components.
# Category: monitoring_misconfiguration

version: '3'
services:
  elasticsearch:
    image: docker.elastic.co/elasticsearch/elasticsearch-oss:7.14.0
    container_name: elasticsearch
    environment:
      - node.name=es01
      - cluster.initial_master_nodes=es01
      - bootstrap.memory_lock=true
      - "ES_JAVA_OPTS=-Xms512m -Xmx512m"
    ulimits:
      memlock:
        soft: -1
        hard: -1
    volumes:
      - data01:/usr/share/elasticsearch/data
    ports:
      - 9200:9200
    networks:
      - elk
  
  logstash:
    image: docker.elastic.co/logstash/logstash-oss:7.14.0
    container_name: logstash
    volumes:
      - ./logstash.conf:/usr/share/logstash/pipeline/logstash.conf
    ports:
      - 5044:5044
    networks:
      - elk
  
  kibana:
    image: docker.elastic.co/kibana/kibana-oss:7.14.0
    container_name: kibana
    ports:
      - 5601:5601
    networks:
      - elk
  
  apm-server:
    image: docker.elastic.co/apm/apm-server:7.14.0
    container_name: apm-server
    ports:
      - 8200:8200
    networks:
      - elk

volumes:
  data01:
    driver: local

networks:
  elk:
